articles.title: JUST IN: Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse Talks About XRP ETFs – Gives a Date
articles.description: Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse said in a live broadcast that XRP ETFs are inevitable. The CEO's statements continue. Garlinghouse said he expects spot XRP ETFs in 2025. articles.title: Web3 Foundation boosts Polkadot’s Asia presence with grant to PolkaPort East
articles.description: The Web3 Foundation, the organization behind Polkadot, has awarded a Decentralized Futures (DF) grant to PolkaPort East to foster the blockchain network’s expansion in Asia, according to a June 4 statement shared with CryptoSlate. This marks Web3 Foundation’s first DF grant to an Asia-based entity. articles.title: VanEck CEO Says Bitcoin To Become at Least Half the Market Cap of Gold – Here’s His Timeline
articles.description: The chief executive of the financial giant VanEck believes that Bitcoin’s (BTC) market cap will eventually soar to at least half of gold’s market cap. In a new interview with Scott Melker, VanEck CEO Jan van Eck says that it could take up to a decade for traditional finance (TradFi) to help drive Bitcoin’s market […]

articles.title: Cardano vs. Bitcoin: A Deep Dive into Charles Hoskinson’s Blockchain Project
articles.description: A newly released YouTube video explores the journey and vision of Charles Hoskinson, a co-founder of Ethereum, who created Cardano to address the limitations of existing blockchain systems. After dropping out of college, Hoskinson mined Bitcoin in 2013 and founded the Bitcoin Education Project, educating thousands about cryptocurrency. However, the challenges of modifying blockchain code...

articles.title: $3.5 Billion Deal to Expand into AI Mining Technology
articles.description: Core Scientific signs a $3.5 billion deal with CoreWeave to expand into AI and HPC, marking a major shift from Bitcoin mining to advanced computing.
